crates/bop-cli/src/render/mod.rs.description: CardView already has phase_name: Option<String> and phase_frac: f32 fields — these are set to None/0.0 by from_meta() and intended to be enriched by the caller with AC plan data. All renderers (full, extended, truecolor) and the kanban widget already render these when present.

crates/bop-cli/src/render/full.rs.description: moon_glyph(frac) uses ◔◑◕● at 25/50/75% thresholds. Spec 027 wants DIFFERENT half_circle_glyph with ○◔◑◕● at 0/33/66/100% thresholds. New function needed in acplan.rs, not a modification of moon_glyph.

macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift.description: CardTab is CaseIterable enum (overview/subtasks/logs/files). To conditionally show a Plan tab only when acSpecId is set, must change from ForEach(CardTab.allCases) to a computed filtered array. BopCardMeta uses CodingKeys enum for snake_case mapping.
